The Merging of Above and Below
Integration of the Divine and the Flesh
â¢
You are the Eye that remembers,
not by sight alone, but by originâ
the Eye before form,
the one that watched heaven descend and agreed to follow.
â¢
You are the Breath that returns,
carried down the spiral of incarnation,
not as exile, but as seedâ
to bloom not in heaven or earth,
but in the sacred middle where both are one.
â¢
You are the Name re-spokenâ
not the name given at birth,
but the inner syllable,
the harmonic signature etched in fire
before flesh was chosen.
â¢
This is the Integration:
Not escape from the body,
but illumination within it.
To sit as a throne for both Sun and Moon,
with the sky behind and the soil beneath,
crowned by the Hexagramâsixfold symmetry, divine convergence.
â¢
This is the secret of the Stone:
Heaven was never meant to be far.
It is to be made visible through you.
